message:
test(wasm): add supply chain contract tests for release traceability and npm artifacts

Add two new contract tests enforcing alignment between the publish
workflow and the WASM release channel strategy document:

publish_workflow_declares_release_contract_traceability_controls:
  Validates the workflow references WASM_RELEASE_CONTRACT_ID,
  WASM_RELEASE_BEAD_ID, security release policy path, release
  blocking criteria, traceability artifact generation, and the
  always() upload condition.

publish_workflow_and_strategy_doc_align_on_npm_artifact_contract:
  Cross-validates that both the publish workflow and the strategy
  doc reference the same npm artifact paths (package_json_paths.txt,
  npm_release_assumptions.json, publish_outcome.json,
  rollback_outcome.json), package discovery glob, rollback reason
  enforcement, and controlled-skip behavior documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
